allow: Bash(xxd "c:/CoM2-damage-calculator/CoM1 or MoM material/Master of Magic Official Release/UNITVIEW.LBX")
Bash(xxd "c:/CoM2-damage-calculator/CoM1 or MoM material/Master of Magic Official Release/LISTDAT.LBX")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x[''''path'''']\) for x in data.get\(''''tree'''',[]\) if any\(k in x[''''path''''].lower\(\) for k in [''''unit'''',''''creature'''',''''listdat'''',''''combat'''']\)]")
Bash(python3 lbxtract.py "../Master of Magic Official Release/FIGURES1.LBX" FIGURES1_extracted)
Bash(ls -la "c:/CoM2-damage-calculator/CoM1 or MoM material/Master of Magic Official Release/"*.LBX)

Bash(python3 -c "import json; f = open\('MoM_units_parsed.json'\); data = json.load\(f\); [print\(f\\"{k}: {v['name']} - abilities: {v.get\('abilities', []\)} - breath: {v.get\('breath_type', 'N/A'\)}\\"\) for k, v in list\(data.items\(\)\)[10:20]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; f = open\('MoM_units_parsed.json'\); data = json.load\(f\); entries = [v for k, v in data.items\(\) if 'missile_imm' in v or 'magic_imm' in v]; [print\(f\\"{v['name']}: {[k for k in ['missile_imm', 'magic_imm', 'death_imm', 'poison_imm'] if k in v]}\\"\) for v in entries[:10]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; f = open\('MoM_units_parsed.json'\); data = json.load\(f\); entries = [v for k, v in data.items\(\) if 'abilities' in v and len\(v['abilities']\) > 1]; [print\(f\\"{v['name']}: {v['abilities']}\\"\) for v in entries[:10]]")
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const code=fs.readFileSync\('combat.js','utf8'\); try { new Function\(code\); console.log\('OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(e.message\); }")
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const code=fs.readFileSync\('data.js','utf8'\); try { new Function\(code\); console.log\('OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(e.message\); }")
